title: Define an application repository port
scenario: Application code depends on domain types and port traits, not concrete database clients.
instructions: Keep the domain command from the starter. Add UserId and NewUser domain types, then define an application module with a UserRepository trait that checks email existence and saves a NewUser.

hints.body: Keep EmailAddress and RegisterUserCommand unchanged. Add UserId and NewUser to the domain module.
In application, define RepositoryError and UserRepository with exists_by_email(&EmailAddress) and save(NewUser).
One complete solution for Define an application repository port is shown below.

completionExplanation: The application layer now owns the repository port while still depending only on domain types, not database or adapter types.
